# CWE-261 — Weak Encoding for Password (vulnerable)
lang: go
file: CWE-261-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/base64"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type Account struct {
	ID       uint
	Username string
	Secret   string
}

// Vulnerable: stores reversible base64 instead of a password hash.
func RegisterUser(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	pw := c.PostForm("password")
	encoded := base64.StdEncoding.EncodeToString([]byte(pw))
	acct := Account{Username: c.PostForm("username"), Secret: encoded}
	db.Create(&acct)
	c.JSON(201, gin.H{"ok": true})
}
